findings.claim_text: A coalition of 42 state attorneys general launched a coordinated enforcement action on June 13, 2026, served by NY AG Letitia James on behalf of the coalition — the first coordinated multi-state enforcement action against an AI platform.
A 2025 Stanford study found an overall sycophancy rate of 58 percent across GPT-4o, Claude, and Gemini on mathematical and medical reasoning tasks.
OpenAI filed a confidential S-1 on June 8, 2026, four days before the subpoena, targeting a public debut as early as September at a valuation analysts project could exceed a trillion dollars.
